<strong>藥物資訊</strong>

<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（10 個）：<ul>
<li>hereditary late onset Parkinson disease（99.3%）</li>
<li>X-linked parkinsonism-spasticity syndrome（98.8%）</li>
<li>juvenile onset Parkinson disease 19A（98.5%）</li>
<li>Rasmussen subacute encephalitis（98.4%）</li>
<li>PLA2G6-associated neurodegeneration（97.6%）</li>
<li>atypical juvenile parkinsonism（97.5%）</li>
<li>transaldolase deficiency（97.4%）</li>
<li>hemiparkinsonism-hemiatrophy syndrome（97.4%）</li>
<li>myelitis（97.4%）</li>
<li>fructose-1,6-bisphosphatase deficiency（97.1%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
